message:
feat(lab): add cancel-ack poll bound, post-close violation detection, traced test harness client

Cancellation protocol oracle (cancellation_protocol.rs):
- Add CANCEL_ACK_POLL_BOUND constant (MAX_MASK_DEPTH + 1): the
  maximum polls a task may remain in CancelRequested before the oracle
  reports a missing acknowledgement. After this bound, checkpoint-masked
  cancellation is no longer making bounded progress.
- New check_cancel_acknowledged method scans for tasks exceeding the
  bound and reports CancelNotAcknowledged violations.
- Integrated into check() and check_all() for comprehensive oracle
  coverage.
- Added tests: cancel_not_acknowledged_detected_after_bounded_polls,
  cancel_acknowledgement_at_bound_remains_valid.

Quiescence oracle (quiescence.rs):
- on_region_create now detects children created after their parent
  was closed and immediately records a violation.
- on_spawn now detects tasks spawned after their region was closed
  and immediately records a violation.
- Added tests: child_created_after_parent_close_is_violation,
  task_spawned_after_region_close_is_violation_even_if_it_completes_later.

Oracle suite (oracle/mod.rs):
- hydrate_temporal_from_state now replays finalizer_history events
  into the finalizer oracle, enabling post-run finalizer invariant
  checking from a RuntimeState snapshot.
- Added test: hydrate_temporal_from_state_replays_finalizer_history.

Test harness (lab/http/harness.rs, mod.rs):
- New TestHarnessClient struct: a traced client bound to the test
  harness that records requests in RequestTrace and uses the harness's
  deterministic batch RNG.
- Methods: get, post, post_json, put, delete, get_batch, send.
- TestHarness::client() now returns TestHarnessClient (was VirtualClient).
- TestHarnessClient is exported from lab::http module.
- Updated module docs to reflect the traced client pattern.
- Added tests: harness_client_records_trace,
  harness_client_batch_is_traced_and_seeded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
